channel.title: keyboards on Prajwal S N
channel.description: Recent content in keyboards on Prajwal S N

item.title: Your keyboard layout is broken
item.description: If you’re like most people, you have a very normal, ordinary keyboard. Nothing fancy. Or maybe you have a mildly abnormal, slightly fancier, and hella lot more expensive keyboard (Hello, r/MechanicalKeyboards). Source: r/pcmasterrace Either way, all of them follow the same fundamental design - there are multiple rows of keys, with each successive row staggered towards the right, and one of these rows starts with the very familiar QWERTY sequence that makes you wonder what kind of drugs the designer was high on while arranging the letters.
